data.title: Citigroup Price Target Trimmed As Analysts Fear Increased Macro Environment-Associated Uncertainty
data.description: Citigroup beat Q1 revenue and earnings estimates, but analysts lowered EPS forecasts and price targets citing macro risks and credit concerns.

data.title: Stocks Sink As Powell Dismisses 'Fed Put' Safety Net, Gold Extends Massive Lead Over Nasdaq
data.description: Powell says tariffs could lead to higher inflation and slower growth, but Fed won't intervene in market losses. Stocks tumble, gold prices rise.

data.title: F/m Investment's ZTOP ETF Targets More Stable Junk Bonds In A Risky Market
data.description: F/m Investments launches new high-yield bond ETF focused on stability, avoiding risks of conventional funds. Uses equal-weighted index and 0.39% expense ratio.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell Says Crypto And Banking Rules Will 'Loosen' As Sector Matures
data.description: Fed Chair Powell signals loosening of regulations on crypto and stablecoins, citing need for clear framework. Industry welcomes shift in tone.

data.title: What's Going On With Robinhood Markets (HOOD) Stock?
data.description: Robinhood Markets shares fell sharply Wednesday afternoon. Stocks across sectors fell after Fed Chair Jerome Powell's remarks linking rising inflation risks to newly imposed trade tariffs.
